name: Anomalous Process For The Host
description: Machine-learning rule that alerts when the anomaly job detects a process that is rare for the host, based on the prebuilt host-anomaly job.
false_positives: Legitimate but infrequent administrative tools will surface as anomalies until the job has learned them.

name: Broken ML Rule With No Job Id
description: A machine_learning rule that omits its job id and must fail validation.
